text:
🏡 Did You Know?

Moss and algae don’t just make your roof and driveway look untidy—they can cause damage over time.

✅ On roofs: Moss holds moisture against tiles, which can lead to premature wear, cracked tiles, and blocked gutters as it breaks away.

✅ On driveways: Algae and moss create slippery surfaces, especially in wet weather, increasing the risk of slips and falls.

Regular cleaning helps protect your property, improve kerb appeal, and can save money on costly repairs in the future.

📍 Serving Ayrshire and surrounding areas.

We haven’t been posting as much this week due to how busy our team has been across Ayrshire.

From driveway cleaning and patio restoration to roof scraping, biocide treatments, decking cleaning and grass cutting, we’ve been helping customers get their properties looking their best for summer.

It’s been great to see so many people taking advantage of our current summer offers and making some fantastic savings.

🏠 ROOF CLEANING SPECIAL OFFER 🏠

Our roof cleaning offer is proving extremely popular and is genuinely HARD TO BEAT. We carry out full manual moss removal followed by a professional biocide treatment to kill off any remaining organic growth and help keep your roof cleaner for longer.

🏠 ROOF CLEANING – SCRAPE & BIOCIDE TREATMENT 🏠

Is your roof covered in moss, algae or lichen?

At Dirty Deeds Exterior Maintenance, we provide a safe and effective roof cleaning service using the professional scrape and biocide method.

✅ Manual moss removal by hand
✅ Gutters cleared of moss and debris
✅ Professional biocide treatment applied to the roof
✅ Kills remaining moss, algae and lichen spores
✅ Helps prevent regrowth
✅ No harsh pressure washing
✅ Safe for roof tiles

Unlike pressure washing, our treatment allows the roof to continue improving over time as the biocide works and the weather naturally removes dead organic growth.
